# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

parameters:
  - name: serverName
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging-sql-server

  - name: adminLogin
    type: string
    defaultValue: sqladmin

  - name: adminPassword
    type: string
    defaultValue: AzureSQL2024!

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    name: $(serverName)
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01-preview
    location: eastus
    properties:
      administratorLogin: $(adminLogin)
      administratorPassword: $(adminPassword)
      requestedServiceObjectiveName: S1

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    name: AllowAzureServices
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01-preview
    properties:
      startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      access: Allow

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    name: AllowDevelopmentIps
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01-preview
    properties:
      startIpAddress: <your_development_ip_start>
      endIpAddress: <your_development_ip_end>
      access: Allow
